narrative_text: The boy sets the bag down at the fruit stand to pick some mangoes. The monkey swings down from the crate, grabs the bag, and scurries up a pole into the narrow lane behind the stalls.
scene_description: The market scene becomes a moment of sneaky mischief as the boy points excitedly at a distant tower. While the mother is distracted, the fluffy brown monkey slyly snatches a shiny ruby red apple from her straw bag. The contrast between the bright red apple and the golden straw bag highlights the monkey's quick move.

properties.distinctive_features: round blue cap with a small brim

entities.pose: leaning forward with eyes wide and one finger pointing toward the distant clock tower

properties.distinctive_features: long brown hair tied in a neat bun

entities.pose: standing with feet shoulder-width apart, looking over her shoulder toward the boy

properties.distinctive_features: thick braided handles and a wide opening

entities.pose: hanging loosely from a shoulder, tilting away from the body

properties.distinctive_features: very long curling tail and bright amber eyes

entities.pose: standing on tip-toes with one arm reaching deep inside a straw bag

properties.distinctive_features: short brown stem with a tiny green leaf

title: The Theft
